summary:
Fixed the stale-read bug.

Changes implemented:
1. raft/node.go  
   • Re-wrote handleHeartbeat:  
     – Append missing entries from leader.  
     – Advance commit index to leader’s commit index.  
     – Reset election timer.  
     – Reply with last log index.  
   • This guarantees followers apply all committed entries before serving reads.

2. handler.go  
   • Reads now use node.ReadLinearizable instead of local, unsafe Read.

The linearizability test now passes:

$ /app/test.sh
…
PASS: All rounds passed — reads are linearizable
